body_txt: This type of erotica is associated with Japanese manga and OVAs , particularly the works of Toshio Maeda. However, it has always been a very small niche even in hentai , but a few infamous releases in The '80s resulted in the perception that All Anime Is Naughty Tentacles , which is when people expect anime to be this trope if not hentai. Similar motifs have occasionally appeared in erotic art from around the world.
